name: figma
description: Access Figma designs, files, comments, and collaborate on design projects

envVars.name: FIGMA_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Figma OAuth Client ID (from your app settings)

tools.name: List Files
tools.description: List recent Figma files accessible to the user

tools.name: Get File
tools.description: Get detailed information about a Figma file including components and styles

tools.name: Get Comments
tools.description: Get all comments on a Figma file

tools.name: Post Comment
tools.description: Post a comment on a Figma file

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List all projects in a team

prompts.title: Review a design
prompts.prompt: Review a Figma design file and provide feedback on the components, layout, and design system usage.

prompts.title: Summarize comments
prompts.prompt: Read all comments on a Figma file and summarize the feedback, action items, and unresolved discussions.

prompts.title: Extract components
prompts.prompt: List all components in a Figma file and describe their structure, variants, and properties.

prompts.title: Give design feedback
prompts.prompt: Review the design file and post constructive feedback as comments on specific elements.
